title: Add contextWindowSizeClass typed-enum field to AIModelFamily entry
description: Substrate's lens-app and form-design economics depend on context window size (8K vs 128K vs 1M behaves very differently). Add `contextWindowSizeClass: AIModelFamilyContextWindowSizeClass` field on the Entry struct. Proposed enum cases (FROZEN once first-shipped): `small` (≤8K), `medium` (8K-32K), `large` (32K-128K), `xlarge` (128K-512K), `xxlarge` (512K-2M), `million-plus` (≥2M). Populate per-family: Apple Foundation ~`medium`; Claude 3.5 Sonnet `xlarge` (200K); Gemini 1.5/2.0 `million-plus` (1M+); GPT-5 `xlarge` (128K); Llama 4 `xlarge` (128K-1M depending on variant); Mistral `large`; Phi `medium`; DeepSeek `large`. Add the new typed enum file `AIModelFamilyContextCapability.swift` next to `AIModelFamilyCapabilities.swift`. Update doctrine tests. Table currently in state 1 (pre-shipped) so adding the field is safe — but the new enum's case ordinals freeze at first commit.
